subcodes.first_line: The Book hath spoken with truth and hath borne witness, even as God Himself hath testified, that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. Verily, He guideth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نطق بالحق و شهد بما شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم انه یهدی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
